taskDescription: Implement notebooks/04_baseline_eval_and_normalization.ipynb for issue #19. The notebook must define the ingest→predict→normalize→score→report pipeline, document the normalization contract, produce record-level EvalRecord artifacts, report overall and per-category accuracy, include failure/drift analysis, and run a golden regression gate. All evaluation infrastructure already exists in src/evaluation/. The notebook replaces an existing scaffold with a full working implementation.
